niche: Fitness centers, workout subscriptions, and D2C health supplements in India

verified_claims.product_offering: Provides group workouts (yoga, strength, dance, boxing), gym access, home workouts, and personalized diet/fitness coaching.
verified_claims.pricing: Cultpass Elite subscription from INR 14,000 to INR 18,000 per year.
key_benefits: Access to premium centers across major Indian cities
Unlimited group classes and gym workouts
Interactive home workout sessions via the Cult app
Personalized nutrition advice and habit tracking
prohibited_claims: DO NOT guarantee specific weight loss numbers.
DO NOT claim workout sessions are effortless or require no discipline.
DO NOT promise medical outcomes or cure diseases.

positioning_guidelines: Focus on community, variety of group classes, premium facilities, and holistic health (mind and body) in India. All pricing in INR.
_blocked_patterns_note: These regex patterns are checked post-generation in generate_ad_script.py. Any script matching one of these patterns is blocked.
